opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My eyes are bright red, they feel like they're full of sand, and I can barely see through the constant watering.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started in one eye yesterday and has spread to both, they're streaming and gritty and my eyelids were stuck together this morning, and I'm worried about passing it to people at work.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 24 hours ago it started in the left eye and then quickly spread to the right
symptom_narrative.duration: a bit over a day and both eyes are now affected
symptom_narrative.character: very red and watery with a strong gritty, sandy feeling like something is in my eyes; the lids were crusted and a bit stuck together this morning but the discharge is watery, not thick pus
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really uncomfortable and annoying, the constant watering blurs my sight, but it is not a deep or severe pain
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both eyes now, the whole white of the eye looks red, and the eyelids are a little puffy
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it began, worst crusting on waking
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: wiping the watering away briefly clears my vision; plain saline drops I bought helped only a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing in particular — it just keeps watering and feeling gritty
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I had a sore throat and runny nose a few days ago; my eyes don't really hurt deeply, bright light doesn't bother me, and I'm not seeing halos or rings around lights
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I don't think I've had anything quite like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: the watering keeps blurring my vision so it's hard to focus on screens, and I've stayed home because I don't want to infect my colleagues

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: generic saline / lubricating eye drops bought over the counter

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, works in an office with close colleagues, sometimes wears contact lenses, keen to avoid spreading the infection at work

objective_data_offered.value: both eyes look very red across the whites, with watery discharge and slightly puffy eyelids; dried crusting is visible on the lashes
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over a video/phone camera, not a clinician eye examination

objective_data_offered.value: a strong gritty, sandy foreign-body sensation in both eyes, worse than any pain
vision goes blurry from the watering but clears again for a moment when I wipe my eyes
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own impression of vision, not a measured visual acuity
